jobs.description: As a software-developer at Quadira i have had the chance to pursue the ambition to become a Fullstack Developer, working on different aspects of the in-house software Advanced-Forms, and the startup of the future successor Advanced-Forms Next.
highlights: Designed new modules for Advanced-Forms, including connectors to SharePoint and MijnOverheid.
Contributed to both the visual and architectural design for the startup of Advanced-Forms Next.
Completely overhauled the CI/CD pipelines for all Quadira's products & services, including automated tests and analysis.
Created new backup- and disaster-recovery protocols for all production environments.
Setup a development server network (partially local and Azure) and maintained different self-hosted development tools.
Kept first aid kits & fire extinguisers up to date.
Created and maintained flight routes & emergency plans throughout the 2 buildings.
Created an emergency & evacuation plan, and setup logs for workplace incidents.

jobs.description: Apart from my technical career i like to keep busy in the weekends. As a host in Bus Whisky's tasting room i am responsible for creating an extraordinary evening for all whisky-lovers after the afternoon-tours through the distillery and before they will spend the night in our on-site B&B.
highlights: Serve up to a 5-course fine-diner of up to 13 tasting-dishes, broadly informing guests of all ingrediënt and techniques.
Pair each course with one of our own Whisky's, biological wines, or home-brewed beers, and educating guests on the origin and processing of the beverage.
Host informative whisky tastings as an extension of the whisky-tour, and advise guests based on their personal whisky-taste in the whisky-shop.
